description_long: This rifle features a tactical, modern design with a prominent suppressor attached to the end of the barrel, giving it a stealth-oriented appearance. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer components, exhibiting a dark finish with red highlights that accentuate its contours and functional parts. It is equipped with a skeletonized stock for reduced weight and improved maneuverability, and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle includes a detachable box magazine, visible beneath the receiver, and a rail system along the top for mounting optics or accessories. The foregrip and additional underbarrel attachments suggest enhanced stability and customization options. The overall build is robust, suitable for urban tactical scenarios where versatility and compactness are essential.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a suppressor, skeletonized stock, detachable box magazine, and red-accented dark finish, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the suppressor, skeletonized stock, pistol grip, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal visibility of the stock and magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rail system, underbarrel attachments, and the overall profile of the rifle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the skeletonized stock and the back of the receiver, with the suppressor visible at the far end.
